CustomField.formula: IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Units_Quote" && NATT_Total_EMCC_Amount__c > 0, "NATT_Unit_Line_Editor_W_BluEdge", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Units_Quote" && ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Type__c, "Quote") && NATT_Has_Special_Request__c, "NATT_Unit_Line_Editor_W_Special_Request", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Units_Quote" && ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Type__c, "Quote"), "NATT_Unit_Line_Editor", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Units_Quote_Amendment", "NATT_Amend_Unit_Line_Editor", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_BluEdge", "NATT_BluEdge_QLE", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTBR_BluEdge", "CTBR_BluEdge_QLE", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_eSolutions", "NATT_eSolutions_QLE", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "MX_Units_Quote", "CTM_Line_Editor", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTM_Units_Quote_Approved", "CTM_Line_Editor", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Direct_Sales", "NATT_Direct_Sales", IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Direct_Sales_Quote_Amendment", "NATT_Direct_Sales_Amend_Line_Editor", IF(OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = "CONTAINER_GENSET_Quote", RecordType.DeveloperName = "CONTAINER_NT_Quote"), "Container_Line_Editor", "SBQQ__LineEditor"))))))))))))
CustomField.label: EditLinesFieldSetName
